# nullcloud_subnet (Resource)

Manages a NullCloud Subnet.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nullcloud_subnet" "example" {
  name   = "my-subnet"
  vpc_id = nullcloud_vpc.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `cidr_block` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
